summary.note: Settings surface implemented as a global overlay: desktop right-side Drawer and narrow bottom Sheet. Triggered from RouteHeader and WorkspaceToolbar. Exposes only implemented owners: theme preference and workspace layout. Static governance, typecheck, production build, dependency audits, and narrow real-browser validation all pass.

CURRENT_IMPLEMENTED: Global settings overlay triggered from product header and workspace toolbar
Desktop Drawer and narrow Sheet variants
Workspace layout preferences that already have an owner
Focus trap, initial focus on close button, return focus to trigger
PROHIBITED: Fake controls for preferences without an owner
Second theme system or second settings state

COR-012.title: 共享 Token 整理与原始视觉值归一
changes: All spacing, colors, borders, radii and typography use src/styles/tokens.css.

COR-013.title: 无障碍与键盘基础
changes: SettingsSurface focuses the close button on open and returns focus to trigger on close.
ProductDrawer/ProductSheet trap focus and close on Escape.
Live region announces setting changes and cross-tab theme updates.
validation: Browser: settings button opens overlay; Tab cycles inside; Escape closes; focus returns to settings button.

COR-021.title: 产品术语清理
changes: User-facing copy uses '设置', '主题', '工作区布局', '显示来源导航', '显示分析区域', '收起工作区工具栏', '棋盘位置', '棋盘朝向', '当前右侧内容', '恢复棋谱与分析自动分区'.

COR-026.title: 统一设置 Drawer/Sheet
changes: Created SettingsSurface as the single settings container.
RouteHeader and WorkspaceToolbar both open the same SettingsSurface.

COR-027.title: Naive UI 项目适配层复用

COR-028.title: 真实浏览器验收跨阶段门
changes: Performed route-specific narrow browser validation on settings overlay from workspace and route header.
validation: Desktop Drawer opens, focus inside, theme switch, close returns focus.
Narrow Sheet opens from bottom, focus inside, close returns focus.
No Vite overlay; no breaking console errors.

checks.workspaceTrigger: Clicking '设置' on workspace toolbar opens settings overlay.
checks.routeHeaderTrigger: Clicking '设置' on RouteHeader opens settings overlay.
checks.drawer: Desktop renders right-side Drawer with title '设置' and description.
checks.sheet: Narrow renders bottom Sheet with same content.
checks.focus: Initial focus is on close button; closing returns focus to trigger button.
checks.themeSwitch: Theme select switches light/dark/system without error.
checks.storageFailure: Simulated failure path shows warning banner and retry button (code path verified).

commands: pnpm run audit:prod PASS (No known vulnerabilities)

risksAndNextSteps: Language, sound, AI defaults and board appearance remain absent until their owner decisions are closed.
